categories.label: Agency Logo
categories.lightingHint: Flat logo mark. Full-color and white-on-transparent versions required.
categories.notes: Logo must be provided as SVG or high-resolution PNG. White variant needed for dark backgrounds.

categories.label: Founder Headshot
categories.lightingHint: Clean professional portrait. Studio or office background. Even lighting, no harsh shadows. Professional but approachable.
categories.notes: Used in the About page founder section and optionally in the hero. Square crop for card components, portrait crop for hero.

categories.label: Team Member Photos
categories.lightingHint: Consistent lighting style across all team photos. White or neutral background preferred for card consistency.
categories.notes: Optional. Used in About page team grid if available. Minimum 2 for the grid to look credible.

categories.label: Named Client Logos
categories.lightingHint: Grayscale or single-color version. Consistent height at 32px rendered.
categories.notes: Displayed in stats bar or hero social proof strip. Grayscale treatment applied at render time. No silhouettes.

categories.label: Third-Party Trust Badges
categories.lightingHint: Official badge from Clutch, G2, HubSpot, or Salesforce. Do not alter colors.
categories.notes: Drop files into public/badges/. MANUAL-DROP-NEEDED.md lists required badges. Stage 4 looks for these on the client site.

categories.label: Case Study Supporting Images
categories.lightingHint: Screenshots of dashboards, pipeline reports, or client interface that show results. Not stock photography.
categories.notes: Optional. Used as supporting visuals in expanded case study cards if permitted by the client.
